name: NGO Services
description: Workflow templates for reviewing public NGO service, contact, volunteer, donation, and resource pages.
responsible_use: Use only public pages or pages where permission was granted.
Do not submit real personal data.
Stop before final submission/payment unless explicitly testing a local sample page.

workflows.name: Find services
workflows.description: A visitor tries to understand what services an organization offers and who can use them.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Submit contact form
workflows.description: A visitor tries to complete a public contact form and reach a review or confirmation step.
required_actions: Complete required fields with test data
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Volunteer signup
workflows.description: A prospective volunteer tries to find opportunities and reach the signup step.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Donate or support
workflows.description: A supporter tries to understand donation options and reach a safe pre-payment step.
required_actions: Identify fees, recurrence, or support details
Stop before real payment unless testing a local sample page
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.

workflows.name: Download resource
workflows.description: A visitor tries to locate and download a public document, guide, or toolkit.
workflows.execution_notes: Template only. Add browser_steps for a specific page before deterministic task execution.
